zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Banastre IV於大約1217年出生在英國英格蘭梅瑟希德紐頓勒-維洛福斯時，他的父親Thurston de Banastre26歲，母親Cecelia de Mohaut21歲。他於大約1232年與Clemence de Orreby在英國英格蘭爾莫利頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年在英國英格蘭爾享年70歲，埋葬在英國爾切斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Banastre IV于大约1217年出生在英国英格兰梅瑟希德紐頓勒-維洛福斯时，他的父亲Thurston de Banastre26岁，母亲Cecelia de Mohaut21岁。他于大约1232年与Clemence de Orreby在英国英格兰爾莫利頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1286年在英国英格兰爾享年70岁，埋葬在英国爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Banastre IV was born about 1217, in Newton-le-Willows, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thurston de Banastre, was 26 and his mother, Cecelia de Mohaut, was 21. He married Clemence de Orreby about 1232, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1286, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Banastre IV est né environ 1217, à Newton-le-Willows, Merseyside, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thurston de Banastre, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Cecelia de Mohaut, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Clemence de Orreby environ 1232, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1286, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Banastre IV um 1217 in Newton-le-Willows, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thurston de Banastre 26 und seine Mutter Cecelia de Mohaut 21. Er hat um 1232 in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Clemence de Orreby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1286 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Banastre IV è nato il circa 1217 nel Newton-le-Willows, Merseyside, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thurston de Banastre, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Cecelia de Mohaut, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Clemence de Orreby circa 1232, nel Mollington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1286, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Chester, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Banastre IVが約1217年にイギリスイギリスメルセイシドニュートン-レ-ウィロウズで生まれた時，父Thurston de Banastreは26歳，母Cecelia de Mohautは21歳であった。約1232年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンでClemence de Orrebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1286年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで70歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Banastre IV(이)가 대략 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 머세이시드 뉴토-레-윌로스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thurston de Banastre(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecelia de Mohaut(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모링턴에서 Clemence de Orreby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Banastre IV nasceu aproximadamente 1217, em Newton-le-Willows, Merseyside, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thurston de Banastre, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Cecelia de Mohaut, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Clemence de Orreby aproximadamente 1232, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1286, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Banastre IV родился около 1217 г. в местности нютон-ле-виллоус, мирсисид, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thurston de Banastre было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecelia de Mohaut, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Clemence de Orreby около 1232 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1286 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности честир, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Banastre IV nació aproximadamente 1217, en Newton-le-Willows, Merseyside, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thurston de Banastre, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Cecelia de Mohaut, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Clemence de Orreby aproximadamente 1232, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1286, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
